questions.hindi: मैं बचपन में तैर सकता था।
questions.english: I could swim when I was a child.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I could swim when I was a child."

questions.hindi: क्या तुम मुझे मदद कर सकते हो?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Could you help me?"

questions.hindi: वह पहले तेज़ दौड़ सकता था।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He could run fast before."

questions.hindi: यह सच हो सकता है।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "It could be true."

questions.hindi: क्या मैं एक सवाल पूछ सकता हूँ?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Could I ask a question?"

questions.hindi: मैं यह पहले नहीं कर सकता था।
questions.english: I could not do this before.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I could not do this before."

questions.hindi: वे इसे पहले संभाल सकते थे।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They could handle it before."

questions.hindi: क्या आप दोबारा बता सकते हैं?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Could you tell me again?"

questions.hindi: बारिश हो सकती है।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "It could rain."

questions.hindi: मैं यह किताब पढ़ सकता था।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I could read this book."

questions.hindi: वह पहले गाना गा सकती थी।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She could sing before."

questions.hindi: क्या मैं आपकी pen ले सकता हूँ?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Could I take your pen?"

questions.hindi: हम पहले साथ काम कर सकते थे।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We could work together before."

questions.hindi: यह एक गलती हो सकती है।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This could be a mistake."

questions.hindi: क्या तुम दरवाज़ा बंद कर सकते हो?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Could you close the door?"

questions.hindi: वह किसी भी भाषा सीख सकता था।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He could learn any language."

questions.hindi: मैं यह पहले समझ सकता था।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I could understand this before."

questions.hindi: क्या मैं यहाँ बैठ सकता हूँ?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Could I sit here?"

questions.hindi: यह अच्छा हो सकता है।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This could be good."

questions.hindi: वे पहले अच्छा खेल सकते थे।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + could + base verb (past ability, polite request, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They could play well before."
